results.title: Nigel Farage says Reform UK would ‘gladly’ accept more donations from crypto billionaire
results.description: The Reform UK leader is being investigated by the Commons sleaze watchdog over a multimillion-pound donation from Christopher Harborne

results.title: Telangana Chief Secretary designate Sanjay Jaju calls on CM Revanth Reddy
results.description: Telangana's new Chief Secretary Sanjay Jaju meets CM Revanth Reddy ahead of officially taking charge from K. Ramakrishna Rao.

results.title: People from these five Irish counties are most likely to make the move to Australia
results.description: From reasons like the cost of living to a better work-life balance, many young people are considering the move to Australia - but some counties have a much higher interest rate than others
